name: Arma Lizamon

signature_move.name: Neutron Laser
signature_move.description: Fires charged neutrons from its mouth.

description: A Reptile Digimon whose whole body is covered in hard scales. It has a habit of consuming high-density minerals in order to maintain the hardness of its scales, and is based near mineral deposits. It has a nature of wandering around in search of new veins once it can no longer extract minerals from a deposit. The minerals devoured by Arma Lizamon are broken down into particles in a "disintegration reactor" housed within it, which are then converted into energy via the vein-shaped particle accelerator that runs throughout its entire body, and is consumed as an energy source for maintaining the hardness of the scales covering its whole body or when attacking. Its " Neutron Laser ", in which it fires charged neutrons generated by the particle accelerator inside its body from its mouth, excels in penetrability, and is powerful enough to pierce even Perfects that are superior to it when unleashed at full power. In addition, it can also attack over a vast range with its " Neutron Diffuser ", in which it fires scattered beams, albeit diminished in power. During close combat, it burns through the enemy with its " Neutron Blade ", beam-shaped blades formed from emitting charged neutrons by expanding the scales on its arms. As it consumes high-density minerals, an Arma Lizamon with a full stomach becomes extremely heavy in weight, so its " Death Roll Press ", where it curls up its body and performs a rolling tackle, exhibits maximum destructive force when it is full. Since it must consume a sufficient amount of minerals for any of its attack methods to be highly effective, individuals found at their mineral deposit feeding grounds are belligerent, but those wandering around in search of veins are low on energy and rarely fight, often fleeing.
